## What this changes

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Test improvement

## Tests

- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Coverage didn't drop (`pytest --cov=agentblackbox`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] No new core dependencies (optional deps fine in `pyproject.toml`)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased" if this is user-visible
- [ ] One concern per PR (refactors and features are separate PRs)
